rationale: Documentation request for bson_error_t; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Documentation improvement to add links to libbson docs; no spec or behavior involvement.
Assertion crash in bson_writer/bson_append_binary; internal implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Unfinished API documentation with TODO sections; documentation bug only.
Performance optimization to eliminate copy of command reply; no spec behavior change.
Internal inconsistency between OP_QUERY and command cursor error reporting; no specific contradicted spec rule identified.
Segfault in BCON_NEW macro with 3+ list items; internal BCON macro bug, not a BSON spec violation.
Evergreen CI config change to enforce client certificates in SSL tests; CI/test infrastructure setup.
Oracle-to-MongoDB migration support question; no driver spec involvement.
Build compliance with C99 and POSIX standards; compilation/build issue, not spec behavior.
bson_ascii_strtoll deviates from strtoll standard library behavior; internal utility bug, no MongoDB spec rule.
SSL opts struct copies pointer but not pointed-to strings; API safety bug, not a spec violation.
Explicitly states cases where driver 'should error per driver spec' but doesn't; Decimal128 spec nonconformance.
Test suite elapsed-time formatting bug on Windows; CI output cosmetic issue only.
Remove extra malloc in Decimal128 BSON-to-JSON conversion; performance optimization with no behavior change.
Deprecate GCC-specific constructor/destructor attributes for cross-platform compat; API deprecation, not spec.
Kerberos plugin cleanup crash during process exit due to destructor ordering; implementation crash, not auth spec violation.
Feature request for separate sslAllowInvalidHostnames/sslAllowInvalidCertificates flags; TLS enhancement, not spec violation.
Explicitly says 'In accordance with the GridFS Spec'---driver missing required custom file_id support.
Feature request to match legacy driver behavior for create_index return value; no spec rule cited.
Documentation fix: wrong return type shown in API docs; docs only, no spec behavior.
Add contributor instructions for error codes; documentation/process, no spec involvement.
Description explicitly says tags with primary mode 'is invalid according to the read preference spec' but driver accepts it.
Documentation restructuring to move TLS examples to better location; docs only.
C++11 driver SSL header compilation failure on Windows CI; build/CI failure, no spec behavior.
JSON test runner fails to recurse into server selection subdirectories; spec test runner bug, not driver behavior.
find_and_modify returns true (success) on writeConcernError; write concern spec requires surfacing this as failure.
SecondaryPreferred wrongly selects primary matching tags when it should fall back; server selection spec bug with SPEC-608 dependency.
Avoid realloc in bulk write execution; performance optimization with no behavior change.
Insufficient detail in description; summary claims incorrect NULL return but drivers connect lazily per spec.
Implementation inconsistency with API docs: reply not always initialized despite docs claiming otherwise; API contract bug.
libbson serializes $binary/$type fields in wrong order per Extended JSON spec; cites MongoDB documentation for correct order.
Enhancement to accept uppercase hex in OID validation; no spec rule requires case-insensitive OID string parsing.
Build compatibility with OpenSSL 1.1.x API changes; build/packaging issue, no spec behavior.
Security hardening: disable TLS compression by default; defensive improvement, not a spec violation.
Add Windows+OpenSSL Evergreen build variant; CI/build infrastructure, no spec behavior.
Add warning when certificate file not found; error message improvement, not a spec violation.
Skip hostname verification for Unix Domain Socket connections; TLS behavior improvement, no spec rule cited.
BSON_EXTRA_ALIGN=0 macro fails MSVC compilation; build/portability bug, no spec behavior.
Improve SSL error message quality; UX/error message improvement, no spec violation.
Static analysis (scan-build) warnings in libbson; code quality/tooling, no spec behavior.
Secure Transport produces reversed RFC2253 DN order vs OpenSSL; internal TLS backend inconsistency within same driver.
ASAN/UBSAN misaligned address errors in libbson; memory safety/portability bug, no spec behavior.
Add Evergreen test variant connecting to multiple mongoses; CI test coverage improvement, not spec behavior.
Buffer overrun in bson_strndup found by AddressSanitizer; memory safety bug, no spec rule violated.
Accept NULL endptr in bson_ascii_strtoll for consistency with strtoll; stdlib API parity, not a MongoDB spec rule.
Connection timeout sets wrong driver-internal error domain; uses driver-specific error codes not defined by any MongoDB spec.
Man pages installation broken due to build system error; packaging/installation bug, no spec behavior.
Two bugs in serverSelectionTryOnce=false: wrong sleep intervals and incorrect timeout logic, violating server selection spec timing rules.
Include mongoc-trace.h in public header for dependent drivers; build/API organization, no spec behavior.
